---
upstream.skill_readme:
---
name: sop-youtube-fetch
description: "SOP Stage B: 获取 YouTube 视频元数据，写入 raw/youtube-metadata/，直接触发 Stage C (notebooklm-research)。"

downstream.title: Telegram 通知
downstream.skill_summary:
---
name: sop-tg-notify
description: "SOP Stage D: 读取 pipeline-context.json，组装完整 pipeline 运行报告，发送富文本 Telegram 通知。"
version: 2.1.0
---
downstream.skill_readme:
---
name: sop-tg-notify
description: "SOP Stage D: 读取 pipeline-context.json，组装完整 pipeline 运行报告，发送富文本 Telegram 通知。"
version: 2.1.0
---

evaluation.summary: The edge from youtube-fetch to tg-notify has an unclear mapping. The upstream node provides source_url (scalar) and metadata_file (file). The downstream node requires a message input (accepts scalar:text, object, file:text, file:markdown, file:json) and an optional index (file:markdown) sourced from a different node. It is not specified which upstream output should be mapped to message or how to structure the handoff.
warnings: The downstream input 'index' is defined with a source 'wiki-build.outputs.index', which is not part of this edge, and may be a misconfiguration.
No explicit mapping or transformation is provided between the upstream outputs and the downstream message input.
required_user_inputs: Specify which upstream output (source_url or metadata_file) should be mapped to the downstream message input.
If needed, define any transformation or formatting for the message content.
Clarify whether the 'index' input is required from the immediate upstream or can be ignored.
evaluation.suggested_edge_instruction: Map the metadata_file output from youtube-fetch directly to the message input of tg-notify, treating the file as a JSON payload. If additional information like source_url is needed, embed it within the message object. For the optional index input, confirm if it is required from this edge or should remain configured from its stated source.
evaluation.recommended_edge_instruction: 读取 youtube-fetch.outputs.metadata_file 中的 title 字段作为 tg-notify.inputs.message。如果 metadata_file 不存在 title 或 title 为空，则阻断。；source_url 只作为补充上下文，不作为消息正文。

primary_artifacts.reason: 上游声明的可交付产物。
上游声明的可交付产物。

downstream_inputs.construction: 需要 Edge Handoff Agent 生成结构化 relay_mappings。
需要 Edge Handoff Agent 生成结构化 relay_mappings。

test_plan: 补齐 Edge Handoff Instruction 或修复契约后重新评估。

baseline.summary: 下游 index, message 是泛化输入，无法确定应该消费上游产物的哪一部分、以什么格式交给下游 Agent。

required_user_inputs.question: 下游节点应该使用哪个上游产物作为主输入？
应该使用全文、摘要、标题、链接、文件目录，还是组合后的上下文？

baseline.suggested_edge_instruction: 读取 youtube-fetch.outputs.metadata_file 中的 title 字段作为 tg-notify.inputs.message。如果 metadata_file 不存在 title 或 title 为空，则阻断。；source_url 只作为补充上下文，不作为消息正文。

需要 Edge Handoff Agent 生成结构化 relay_mappings。

Only override it when the handoff is actually unclear or unsafe." So we need to check if the handoff is actually unclear or unsafe. 

Let's analyze the edge: from youtube-fetch to tg-notify. The upstream outputs: source_url (scalar url) and metadata_file (file json). We need to decide if a direct mapping is possible or if instruction is needed. 

The baseline suggests "needs_instruction" with a suggested edge instruction: "读取 youtube-fetch.outputs.metadata_file 中的 title 字段作为 tg-notify.inputs.message。如果 metadata_file 不存在 title 或 title 为空，则阻断。；source_url 只作为补充上下文，不作为消息正文。" That uses an extract_field pattern. But the message input has a resolver "metadata-title" which is a json_path resolver to extract title. So the downstream already declares it can handle a json_path extraction. The resolver id "metadata-title" is defined: json_path, path "$.title". So if we map the metadata_file to message using the resolver "metadata-title", that would be a valid relay mapping. So we could do ready status with a relay_mapping: source_output = metadata_file, target_input = message, resolver = "metadata-title". But the baseline says needs_instruction, with the suggested instruction essentially describing exactly that mapping. However, the instruction says we should only override the baseline if the handoff is actually unclear or unsafe. Is it unclear? The downstream input accepts object and has a resolver that extracts title from a json. The upstream output is a json file. So it seems like a clean mapping: relay metadata_file to message using the metadata-title resolver. The baseline says it's unclear because "index, message 是泛化输入，无法确定应该消费上游产物的哪一部分、以什么格式交给下游". But index is not from this upstream node. The message input is generic, but the downstream provides resolvers that specify how to extract from a provided file. So we might argue it is clear: use the metadata_file and apply the metadata-title resolver to get the title. That yields a ready status. However, the baseline says needs_instruction. The instruction says: "Only override it when the handoff is actually unclear or unsafe." So perhaps the baseline is correct because the message input could accept many things, and we don't know if the user wants just the title or something else? But the downstream node is a notify node that sends a Telegram message. Typically, you want a message that includes some information. The downstream input message is required and has multiple resolvers: direct-text, metadata-title, metadata-description. So it can take a json file and extract a title or description. That suggests the node is designed to consume a metadata json and extract a specific field. The upstream metadata_file is exactly that: a json file. So it seems natural to map it. The baseline's suggested instruction is to map title field. That is exactly what the metadata-title resolver does. So why is it unclear? Possibly because the upstream outputs both source_url and metadata_file, and we could also map the source_url as a direct-url? But the message input doesn't have a direct-url resolver, it has direct-text. So we could map source_url as direct-text. But the baseline says source_url should be supporting context, not message body. That suggests the best mapping is metadata_title. 

Given that the downstream node explicitly lists "metadata-title" as a resolver for the message input, and the upstream provides a metadata json file, I'd say the handoff is clear: map metadata_file -> message with resolver metadata-title. That would yield status ready. But the baseline says needs_instruction.

Required keys: status, summary, warnings, required_user_inputs.
If status is blocked, incompatible, or needs_instruction and a user instruction could fix it, include a complete suggested_edge_instruction that can be directly applied.
Include handoff_pattern and validation when possible.
If the previous response describes concrete source-to-target handoff, include resolved_handoff.relay_mappings with source_output, target_input, resolver.
Allowed statuses: ['blocked', 'incompatible', 'needs_instruction', 'ready', 'trial_ready']
If the text says the handoff is runnable, use status ready or trial_ready.
If the text says clarification is needed, use needs_instruction.

parsed.summary: The edge from youtube-fetch to tg-notify has an unclear mapping. The upstream node provides source_url (scalar) and metadata_file (file). The downstream node requires a message input (accepts scalar:text, object, file:text, file:markdown, file:json) and an optional index (file:markdown) sourced from a different node. It is not specified which upstream output should be mapped to message or how to structure the handoff.
warnings: The downstream input 'index' is defined with a source 'wiki-build.outputs.index', which is not part of this edge, and may be a misconfiguration.
No explicit mapping or transformation is provided between the upstream outputs and the downstream message input.
required_user_inputs: Specify which upstream output (source_url or metadata_file) should be mapped to the downstream message input.
If needed, define any transformation or formatting for the message content.
Clarify whether the 'index' input is required from the immediate upstream or can be ignored.
parsed.suggested_edge_instruction: Map the metadata_file output from youtube-fetch directly to the message input of tg-notify, treating the file as a JSON payload. If additional information like source_url is needed, embed it within the message object. For the optional index input, confirm if it is required from this edge or should remain configured from its stated source.

upstream.title: YouTube 元数据获取
upstream.skill_summary:
---
name: sop-youtube-fetch
description: "SOP Stage B: 获取 YouTube 视频元数据，写入 raw/youtube-metadata/，直接触发 Stage C (notebooklm-research)。"
version: 1.0.0
---

downstream.title: Telegram 通知
downstream.skill_summary:
---
name: sop-tg-notify
description: "SOP Stage D: 读取 pipeline-context.json，组装完整 pipeline 运行报告，发送富文本 Telegram 通知。"
version: 2.1.0
---

baseline.summary: 下游 index, message 是泛化输入，无法确定应该消费上游产物的哪一部分、以什么格式交给下游 Agent。
